prompt: We are starting a project to replace our old QuickBooks setup with NetSuite. We have 3 subsidiaries and 50 users. We need to migrate all historical data and set up O2C and P2P processes. How do we start?
assertions: Recommends Tier 1 classification and explains why (multi-subsidiary, full O2C+P2P migration qualifies as full implementation)
Identifies Brownfield origin because QuickBooks historical data requires migration
Explicitly asks for user confirmation before proceeding to scaffold the workspace
Mentions creating a 7-phase folder structure (01_Discovery through 07_GoLive)
Mentions creating a PLAN.md coordination artifact
